occurrence_sentence: Viavi Solutions Inc. announced the addition of performance testing capability for Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) system deployments.

PRESS RELEASE — [Viavi Solutions Inc.](https://tr-4.tlink.re/t/PZPmEph-RkeJJtFV3xpvcQ/l/kI_2-W-CM0G0Edl6K-LSWg/m/6lVJ7TSE-UijwY2ta5pSJg) announced the addition of performance testing capability for Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) system deployments.
